description: This is perfect for SEO audits.
author: Sam E.
pros: What was apparent to me was how easy the software was to use. The layout of the website is visually exciting. The use of colours makes every time I visit the website fun and not tedious. This helps you to break down each part of the audit.
cons: All in all, it's a great tool, but the customer service was sometimes a bit slow.

description: Support is excellent, tool will need to improve and it seems to be on the right path to do that too
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Yes, Serpwizz is on its way to becoming the best SEO audit tool ever. This is a challenge as there have been many established tools in the market. But with the addition of the features mentioned in the roadmap and perhaps a UI improvement similar to Uber suggest, I am confident this tool will go places.
cons: Cons are quite few and far between, I feel the UI needs to be more premium looking and the tool needs a few more features to match the financial investment made by users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Stay away from this completely worthless product
description: The product was a NIGHTMARE from day one. The support is non-existent, and the [sensitive content hidden] has ZERO care factor about any of it. Essentially, the product does not and never has worked correctly. I have made their support videos demonstrating the issues (repeatedly) and have even gone as far as providing them with their competitor's working embed code as an example. It took them MONTHS to get that working, only to have it cease working again. Support didn't understand DNS well enough to make white-label URL's functional. Like with the embedding issue, I ended up making them videos to explain how DNS worked and helped them resolve the problem. Eventually, after (literally) years, I got tired of the whole thing and threatened to sue them. At that point, they blocked access to the lifetime account I had purchased from AppSumo and ceased communicating with me. Search for them on Facebook, and you'll find I'm far from the only user with this type of experience.
author: Tony G.
pros: There is absolutely NOTHING to like about this product or the people behind it. The product is worthless. The people behind it are scammers. It's really that simple.
cons: What I liked least was purchasing a lifetime deal for the product with AppSumo, only to have my account blocked when my requests for support became too difficult for them to manage.

author: Nathalie R.
pros: Serpwizz makes it easier for individuals handling and planning content like me to determine the most relevant keywords to bring more traffic and awareness to our website. The interface is very user-friendly, easy to navigate and straight to the point which is what I very much prefer. By using this tool, we are able to plan content efficiently and with ease.
cons: Very minor improvements but not to the point that it hinders functionality and easy of use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Cielo R.
pros: SERPWizz has a user-friendly interface that makes it easy to navigate and understand. Even if you're not an SEO expert, you can use SERPWizz to identify and fix issues that may be affecting your website's search engine rankings.
cons: While SERPWizz's report templates are comprehensive and useful, some users like me prefer more customization options. It would be great to have the ability to create custom report templates or edit existing templates.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Support like this is what kills businesses
description: Absolutely terrible experience so far. Getting no support whatsoever.
author: Ettienne V.
pros: Ease of use (if it actually worked the way it's supposed to that is, I wouldn't know since not one support team member can help me get my whitelabeling set up)
cons: The support who can't seem to be able to answer the most simple questions. 9 Days now I've been trying to get things set up correctly, yet nobody there can assist me it seems.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Serpwizz allowed us to improve the content on our website as well as our online presence by highlighting the aspects that weren't performing as best as they could.
author: Federica G.
pros: What I love about Serpwizz is how fast you can get a very detailed SEO report about any website! Details are not only referred to the actual results of the audit, but also about things that can be improved by following a few tooltips. I highly recommend this tool!
cons: Sometimes the tool structure and functionality is a bit confusing, but the team is always willing to help and share their video tutorials
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have been able to better understand different areas of SEO which can be confusing. This product is easy for my employees to understand and has helped us decide which actions to take.
author: Celeste R.
pros: I really appreciate the price and ease of use of this tool. A lot of SEO tool kits are very expensive and challenging to use.
cons: The interface sometimes is unclear but they are working on it!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
